steps.title: Identify the relevant groups from the table
steps.content: The table gives population shares by age group. The group "greater than 65" makes up 21% of the city. The groups that are "at least 18" are: 18–40 (23%), 41–65 (22%), and greater than 65 (21%), totaling $23 + 22 + 21 = 66\%$ of the city.

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content:
0.318 rounded to two decimal places is 0.32.
  • $0.21$ is the unconditional share over 65, not the conditional probability — eliminate.
  • $0.32$ matches $0.21 / 0.66 \approx 0.318$ — keep.
  • $0.45$ is too large — eliminate.
  • $0.62$ is closer to the share "at least 18", not the answer — eliminate.
B is correct.
